testcase.name: basicHeadTailSplit
testcase.system-out: 12:58:40.430 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L1SlidingWindowTrim -- [L1] 滑动窗口: 非系统消息 10→6 (头3/尾3), 丢弃 4 条中间消息, tokens 10→6, budget=100000, satisfied=true

testcase.name: pairProtectionTailBackward

failure.message: head有3条(pair占2)+tail有1条=4条，pair整体保留 ==> expected: <4> but was: <2>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: head有3条(pair占2)+tail有1条=4条，pair整体保留 ==> expected: <4> but was: <2> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:563) at com.kaer.context.compact.L1SlidingWindowTrimTest.pairProtectionTailBackward(L1SlidingWindowTrimTest.java:148) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
testcase.system-out: 12:58:40.434 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L1SlidingWindowTrim -- [L1] 滑动窗口: 非系统消息 7→2 (头1/尾1), 丢弃 5 条中间消息, tokens 17→3, budget=100000, satisfied=true

testcase.name: removeOrphanCallerFromHead
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <5> but was: <3> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:145) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:531) at com.kaer.context.compact.L1SlidingWindowTrimTest.removeOrphanCallerFromHead(L1SlidingWindowTrimTest.java:219) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
testcase.system-out: 12:58:40.436 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L1SlidingWindowTrim -- [L1] 滑动窗口: 非系统消息 7→3 (头1/尾2), 丢弃 4 条中间消息, tokens 15→6, budget=100000, satisfied=true

testcase.name: removeOrphanResponseFromTail

testcase.name: budgetSatisfiedAfterTrim
testcase.system-out: 12:58:40.442 [main] INFO com.kaer.context.compact.L1SlidingWindowTrim -- [L1] 滑动窗口: 非系统消息 50→8 (头3/尾5), 丢弃 42 条中间消息, tokens 700→112, budget=175, satisfied=true
